fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the data was generated

fields.name: source_department
fields.description: The department that originated the data

fields.name: destination_department
fields.description: The department that received the message

fields.name: reporting_date
fields.description: Date for which the report is being generated

fields.name: data
fields.description: Main data payload of the message

children.name: portfolio_summary
children.description: Summary statistics for the portfolio

children.name: total_positions
children.description: Total number of positions in the portfolio

children.name: total_market_value
children.description: Total market value of the portfolio

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency in which the portfolio is valued

children.name: concentration_threshold_alert
children.description: Whether a concentration threshold has been exceeded

children.name: concentration_by_sector
children.description: Breakdown of portfolio concentration by sector

children.name: sector
children.description: Sector in which the positions are concentrated

children.name: percentage_of_portfolio
children.description: Percentage of the portfolio concentrated in this sector

children.name: number_of_positions
children.description: Number of positions in this sector

children.name: market_value
children.description: Market value of the positions in this sector

children.name: risk_level
children.description: Risk level associated with this sector

children.name: concentration_by_single_name
children.description: Breakdown of portfolio concentration by single name (issuer)

children.name: issuer_name
children.description: Name of the issuer (company) in which positions are concentrated

children.name: ticker
children.description: Ticker symbol of the issuer (company)

children.name: percentage_of_portfolio
children.description: Percentage of the portfolio concentrated in this issuer

children.name: market_value
children.description: Market value of the positions in this issuer

children.name: number_of_shares
children.description: Number of shares held in this issuer

children.name: compliance_status
children.description: Compliance status of the positions in this issuer

children.name: regulatory_limit
children.description: Regulatory limit for the positions in this issuer

children.name: concentration_by_geography
children.description: Breakdown of portfolio concentration by geography (country)

children.name: country
children.description: Country in which the positions are concentrated

children.name: percentage_of_portfolio
children.description: Percentage of the portfolio concentrated in this country

children.name: number_of_positions
children.description: Number of positions in this country

children.name: market_value
children.description: Market value of the positions in this country
